strategic_objective: Investigate how class imbalance and data duplication influence the observed dependency-backed regularities and assess the stability of these regularities across other datasets or partitions.
key_checks: Quantify class imbalance and duplication impact on feature distribution and dependencies
Compare dependency-backed regularities across dataset partitions or external datasets
Evaluate variability of low-variability feature clusters under different sampling conditions
Assess whether regularities persist beyond duplicated or imbalanced data
success_criteria: Clear understanding of amplification or distortion effects from imbalance and duplication
Evidence of stability or dataset-specific nature of dependency-backed regularities
Bounded epistemic uncertainty regarding these regularities
router_constraints: preserve dataset scope for duplication and imbalance context
